allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Project improvements and build verification

- Verified build process works correctly
- Cleaned up repository state
- Removed unnecessary files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Pascal package version conflict + stable build

- Fixed @pascal-app/viewer and @pascal-app/core version compatibility
- Downgraded to viewer@0.1.13 and core@0.1.13 for compatibility
- Updated package.json to resolve ERESOLVE conflicts
- Verified build now passes with "✓ Compiled successfully"
- Pascal 3D viewer integration working

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: replace Pascal npm packages with iframe approach

- Removed @pascal-app/core, @pascal-app/viewer, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei packages
- Deleted PascalViewerInner.tsx component  
- Replaced PascalViewer with iframe-based approach using editor.pascal.app
- Updated projects page to show Pascal Editor link instead of client-side rendering
- Removed sceneData loading and processing logic from portal page
- Kept three.js package for landing page 3D background
- Build now passes with zero dependency conflicts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: landing page CTA buttons

- Fixed ''Voir la démo'' button to scroll smoothly to features section
- ''Démarrer gratuitement'' already correctly links to /auth
- ''Se connecter'' in navbar already correctly links to /auth
- Improved user experience with smooth scroll demo navigation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: demo button redirects to dashboard with demo data

- Changed ''Voir la démo'' button from scroll to Link pointing to /dashboard
- Dashboard shows pre-registered demo project data for proper demo experience
- Visitors can now see actual Aedis interface with realistic data

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
